title: Manufacturing Locations
author: JSL EKOS
description: This module introduces employees to Jindal Stainless Limited's manufacturing facilities, their capabilities, and their importance in the company's integrated stainless steel production network.
learningObjectives: Understand the role of each manufacturing facility.
Recognize the importance of plant coordination.

content.introduction: Jindal Stainless Limited operates world-class manufacturing facilities equipped with modern technology for producing high-quality stainless steel products. These facilities work together to support efficient production, quality control, and timely customer delivery.
content.overview: Each manufacturing location performs specific operations while remaining connected through integrated production planning and supply chain management.

majorLocations.name: Hisar Plant
majorLocations.description: Integrated stainless steel manufacturing facility with advanced hot rolling, cold rolling, annealing, pickling, finishing, and dispatch operations.

majorLocations.name: Jajpur Plant
majorLocations.description: Modern integrated stainless steel plant with steel melting, continuous casting, hot rolling, and downstream processing facilities.

content.summary: JSL's manufacturing facilities operate as an integrated network, ensuring efficient production, consistent quality, and reliable delivery of stainless steel products.
